nasb.text: Therefore the well was called Beer-lahai-roi; behold, it is between Kadesh and Bered.

esv.text: Therefore the well was called Beer-lahai-roi; it lies between Kadesh and Bered.

cnv.text: 因此，這井名叫庇耳．拉海．萊，是在加低斯和巴列之間。

ccb.text: 因此，她称加低斯和巴列之间的那口井为庇耳·拉海·莱。

csbs.text: 因此这井被称为庇耳-拉海-莱，就在加低斯和贝列德之间。
